name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: 3 women challenging Neil Gorsuch >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7d3e/24c69fd9/f3fb3f22/18e0326f/2170912023/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE322N_digital_email_20170320_PreGorsuchHearing_n-all&source=WQEFE322N_digital_email_20170320_PreGorsuchHearing_n-all")
---

Peter,

All throughout the 2016 election, Donald Trump promised that if elected, he'd nominate an anti-choice justice to the Supreme Court.

With Judge Neil Gorsuch's Supreme Court confirmation hearing happening this week, Trump is one step closer to getting his way.

Our EMILY's List women in the Senate are our absolute best line of defense to protect choice. Senators Dianne Feinstein, Amy Klobuchar, and Mazie Hirono are all on the committee questioning Gorsuch -- and they're pushing on his anti-woman record as hard as they can.

**[Donate $3 today to tell them you've got their backs and are ready to defend choice.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7d3e/24c69fd9/f3fb3f22/18e03268/2170912023/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170320_email_GorsuchHearing?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+today+to+tell+them+youve+got+th&utm_campaign=WQEFE322N_digital_email_20170320_PreGorsuchHearing_n-all&source=WQEFE322N_digital_email_20170320_PreGorsuchHearing_n-all")**

With anti-choice legislation coming at breakneck speed from states across the country, having someone like Neil Gorsuch on the bench would be a disaster for women and families.

As a law professor, he allegedly told his students that women intentionally manipulate maternity leave at work to take advantage of benefits and then leave the company to stay at home with their children. That's why he recommended asking women in job interviews if they plan on becoming pregnant.

And throughout his tenure as a judge, he's repeatedly made decisions that side with employers over people. At the U.S. Court of Appeals, he sided with Hobby Lobby in a decision that allows employers to block workers' access to contraception -- something no boss should have the power to decide.

**With Neil Gorsuch on the bench,_Roe v. Wade_ could be overturned. And since he's only 49 years old, Gorsuch could serve on the court for decades to come.**

His nomination is dependent on the Senate's confirmation, and our EMILY's List women are going to be fighting it with everything they have.

We **have** to stop him.

**Donate $3 now to have our senators' backs and make sure we always have pro-choice champions in Congress:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Gorsuch-Hearing](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7d3e/24c69fd9/f3fb3f22/18e03269/2170912023/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170320_email_GorsuchHearing?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgGorsuchHearing&utm_campaign=WQEFE322N_digital_email_20170320_PreGorsuchHearing_n-all&source=WQEFE322N_digital_email_20170320_PreGorsuchHearing_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black,
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7d3e/24c69fd9/f3fb3f22/18e0326a/2170912023/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170320_email_GorsuchHearing?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFE322N_digital_email_20170320_PreGorsuchHearing_n-all&source=WQEFE322N_digital_email_20170320_PreGorsuchHearing_n-all")

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: Neil Gorsuch
body:
Stand with Democrats as we fight back against Trump's SCOTUS nomination
---
**Add your name: tell the Senate to reject Judge Gorsuch's nomination.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170321_ew_nd&source=em_20170321_ew_nd")**
Friend --

Neil Gorsuch, Donald Trump's Supreme Court nominee, is on Capitol Hill this week for the start of his confirmation hearings. We don't know much about Gorsuch, but here's what we do know: he's a radical supporter of big business who believes corporations are people.

**[Democrats are going to make Neil Gorsuch answer some tough questions about his record -- and then fight like hell to stop his confirmation. Can we count on you to stand with us?](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Democrats+are+going+to+make+Neil+Gorsuch&utm_campaign=em_20170321_ew_nd&source=em_20170321_ew_nd")**

Gorsuch's rulings have been said to "defy common sense and fairness" -- and you don't have to dig too deep to figure out why. He routinely sides with CEOs and corporate interests over the interests of hardworking Americans. He has ruled in favor of insurance companies who want to deny disability benefits and employers facing discrimination claims from their employees.

He was also closely involved in the Bush Administration's assertion that the powers of the president cannot be checked by the judiciary -- so it's not hard to imagine why Donald Trump, who has repeatedly attacked court rulings striking down his unconstitutional Muslim ban, finds him so appealing.

If he's confirmed, Gorsuch would be a stool pigeon for corporate interests, a stone wall standing in the way of working people seeking justice, and a rubber stamp for Donald Trump's extreme agenda on our nation's highest court.

**Add your name right now to stand with Democrats who are fighting back, and tell the Senate to reject Judge Neil Gorsuch's nomination:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170321_ew_nd&source=em_20170321_ew_nd")**
Thanks so much,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

body:
Yesterday, the directors of the National Security Agency and the Federal Bureau of Investigation testified before lawmakers on Capitol Hill about Russia's involvement in the 2016 election. Yesterday, the directors of the National Security Agency and the Federal Bureau of Investigation testified before lawmakers on Capitol Hill about Russia's involvement in the 2016 election.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e271/2b07114c/58181ed3/736b27e2/1688181232/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-investigation?source=PT-20170321-Nielsen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")
Friend --

Yesterday, the directors of the National Security Agency and the Federal Bureau of Investigation testified before lawmakers on Capitol Hill about Russia's involvement in the 2016 election.

We learned some important new details.

First, the accusations Donald Trump made against President Obama about wiretaps at Trump Tower were completely baseless. James Comey, the FBI director, said the agency has "no information" to support Trump's claim.

Second, we heard Comey say that Russia interfered in the 2016 election to boost Trump and hurt Hillary.

Finally, the FBI confirmed publicly, for the first time, that the agency is conducting an investigation into that interference and exploring whether associates of the president were in contact with Moscow.

**[Yesterday's hearings underscored the need for an independent investigation into Trump's ties to Russia. Add your name to support the appointment of a special prosecutor.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e271/2b07114c/58181ed3/736b27e2/1688181232/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-investigation?source=PT-20170321-Nielsen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Here's why that independent investigation is so crucial:

Two of the nation's top intelligence officials detailed the ways in which a foreign power attempted to undermine our democracy, and Republicans tried to steer the focus toward a different matter altogether.

Repeatedly, they asked Comey and NSA Director Michael Rogers about the leaks to the media that have brought so much of this story into the public eye.

During the hearing, the White House even used the @POTUS Twitter feed to imply that some of the leaks may have come from President Obama.

If Republicans would rather target whistleblowers instead of discovering the truth about Moscow's involvement in our election, then a special prosecutor is our only path forward.

If you want to discover what really happened in the presidential campaign, add your name to support an independent investigation:

**[http://dscc.org/trump-investigation](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e271/2b07114c/58181ed3/736b27e2/1688181232/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-investigation?source=PT-20170321-Nielsen-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=")**

Thanks,

Stephanie Nielsen
DSCC Research Director

**A quick note on contributions, friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. name: The White House
subject: Judge Gorsuch: In His Own Words
body:
Watch the Video and Stand with Judge Gorsuch. |
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c0a11ea8bad436efc13fb2efe33205816f36487d5f76b7ea8ec1a069bb216cad825e9eb810d2eb114b7c6be5af544f09b0dd65dc50243518)

Yesterday, Judge Neil Gorsuch began his 4-day hearing to become the next Justice of the Supreme Court. After months of meeting with 72 Senators from both sides of the aisle and creating a lasting impression on lawmakers and media alike, Judge Gorsuch will finally get his chance to show exactly what kind of asset he will be to our Supreme Court. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c0a11ea8bad436efc13fb2efe33205816f36487d5f76b7ea8ec1a069bb216cad825e9eb810d2eb114b7c6be5af544f09b0dd65dc50243518)
Judge Gorsuch has spent his career fighting for plaintiffs and defendants alike, carefully applying the law to each situation, and staying clear of any kind of politics or favoritism. In 2005, after a successful career as an attorney in private practice, Judge Gorsuch devoted his time to serving his country as Principal Deputy Associate Attorney General at the Justice Department. There, he continued to serve the needs of the American people in civil litigation.

Several of Judge Gorsuch’s opinions are well known for their style, steadfast commitment to constitutional principles, and the fundamental principle of equal justice for all. In one opinion, he warned, “something distinct, different, and more problematic [is] afoot when the government selectively infringes on a fundamental right.”

President Donald J. Trump nominated Judge Neil Gorsuch because he knew he would embody all the qualities of the late, great, Justice Antonin Scalia; equal justice under the law, steadfast commitment to constitutional principles, and justice aside from people or politics. A strong and knowledgeable Supreme Court is essential to our country’s success. To that end, we must have the most qualified jurists on the bench—people like Judge Gorsuch.

**[Stand with President Trump and demand the confirmation of Judge Neil Gorsuch. Sign the Petition.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c0a11ea8bad436ef05ae1bba57752677299bf11858b8feace8ba62e6be4a673aae000d9e1c61b39adff8a151b0f1826c525d91872be6af00)**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c0a11ea8bad436ef98e46e09e53abd0115b8f1b80962f6c1fc9b26be0f6bdd77264aeb482b1510e50b80751bc3e1398a9e21e670d09f516a) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c0a11ea8bad436efe28f359518fd31639f346fc364a114856a470675c5cc1c4c462c4c35e196aeda51967d415f91c86232ffd62c36a30b95)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4775b1e9dc020687dad8947f6dbab29b91a4a3d2adbfcc79561cbec52f9a9ace38bde9d7dd9f7b93604eb8678cd466e47)
